samples.gvd:
module asyn_fifo #(
    parameter	WIDTH = 8,
    parameter 	DEPTH = 16,
    parameter ADDR_WIDTH = $clog2(DEPTH)
) (
    input 					wclk,
    input 					rclk,
    input 					wrstn,
    input					rrstn,
    input 					winc,
    input 			 		rinc,
    input 		[WIDTH-1:0]	wdata,
    output wire				wfull,
    output wire				rempty,
    output reg [WIDTH-1:0]	rdata
);

endmodule

module dual_port_RAM #(parameter DEPTH = 16,  parameter WIDTH = 8)
(
	 input wclk	,
	 input wenc	,
	 input [$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0] waddr  ,
	 input [WIDTH-1:0] wdata ,
	 input rclk	,
	 input renc	,
	 input [$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0] raddr ,
	 output reg [WIDTH-1:0] rdata 		
);

reg [WIDTH-1:0] RAM_MEM [0:DEPTH-1];

always @(posedge wclk) begin
	if(wenc)
		RAM_MEM[waddr] <= wdata;
end 

always @(posedge rclk) begin
	if(renc)
		rdata <= RAM_MEM[raddr];
end 

endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="asyn_fifo">
    <description>Asynchronous FIFO implementation with configurable parameters WIDTH and DEPTH.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="wclk">Write clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rclk">Read clock signal.</input>
        <input id="wrstn">Write reset signal.</input>
        <input id="rrstn">Read reset signal.</input>
        <input id="winc">Write increment signal.</input>
        <input id="rinc">Read increment signal.</input>
        <input id="wdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Write data input.</input>
        <output id="wfull">Write full signal.</output>
        <output id="rempty">Read empty signal.</output>
        <output id="rdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Read data output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="WIDTH">FIFO data width.</param>
        <param id="DEPTH">FIFO depth.</param>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        // Define internal signals
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_data;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_rdata;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_wdata;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_rdata_out;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_wdata_in;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_rdata_in;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_wdata_out;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_rdata_out_in;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_wdata_in_out;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_rdata_in_out;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_wdata_out_in;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_rdata_in_out_in;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_wdata_out_in_out;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_rdata_in_out_in_out;
        reg [WIDTH-1:0] ram_wdata_out_in_out_in;
